scenario.description: Alice's first meal of the day — vegetarian breakfast

recipes.label: Corn Bread
recipes.instructions:
Step 1: Preheat oven to 350 degrees.

Step 2: Generously grease a 9 x 13 inch baking pan or a 12 inch cast iron skillet.

Step 3: Sift the dry ingredients into a large bowl.

Step 4: In another bowl, combine the wet ingredients and stir until mixed.

Step 5: Fold the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients.

Step 6: Smooth the batter into the baking pan or skillet and bake for 25 to 30 minutes, or until a knife inserted into the center comes out clean.

Step 7: Allow the corn bread to cool for at least 10 minutes before serving.

recipes.label: White Cheddar Grits with Veggies
ingredients: 2½ cups white cheddar cheese, shredded, divided
2 cups cremini mushrooms, cut in half
4 baby zucchini, ends trimmed and cut in half
1 red bell pepper, cut into 1-inch squares
1 orange bell pepper, cut into 1-inch squares
1 red onion, sliced in half and quartered
recipes.instructions:
Step 1: Preheat oven to 350F.In a 3-quart pan, bring broth and minced garlic to a boil over high heat. Stirring, slowly add the grits. Reduce heat to simmer and stir frequently for 5 minutes.

Step 2: Remove from heat and stir in 1 cup cheddar cheese until melted.In a small bowl, combine the eggs and milk. Using a whisk, slowly add the egg mixture to the grits. Beat until thoroughly blended.

Step 3: Pour into a buttered 2-quart baking dish and sprinkle evenly with remaining cheese.

Step 4: Bake uncovered in the oven until the top is golden brown, about 45-50 minutes. In the meantime, prepare the vegetables to roast by cutting the mushrooms and baby zucchini in half, slicing the zucchini into 1 inch rounds, cutting the bell pepper into 1 inch squares, trimming the asparagus, quartering the red onions, and slicing the radicchio.Lightly oil a baking sheet or coat with nonstick spray.

Step 5: Place the cremini mushrooms, zucchini, bell peppers, asparagus, red onion and radicchio in a large bowl.

Step 6: Drizzle with the olive oil, then season with the rosemary, garlic powder, salt, and pepper; gently toss to combine.

Step 7: Lay the vegetables out on the prepared pan in an even layer.After the grits are done, remove them from the oven and cover with foil to keep warm while you roast the vegetables.Turn the oven up to 425F. When it reaches temperature, roast the vegetables in the oven until they are tender, about 15 minutes, tossing them once during that time.To assemble, place the roasted vegetables down the center of the grits and sprinkle with sliced red cayenne pepper (if desired) and feta cheese.

Step 8: Serve immediately.

recipes.label: Apple Pie Smoothie
ingredients: 1 red delicious apple, cut into pieces
recipes.instructions:
Step 1: Combine all ingredients in a blender and pulse until smooth.

Step 2: Serve immediately.

scenario.description: Alice's lunch after consuming 380 cal at breakfast

recipes.label: Traditional Panzanella
ingredients: 1 pound six or seven day-old Tuscan bread
recipes.instructions:
Step 1: In a bowl combine the bread with water and let it stand for at least 20 minutes or until it's soft.

Step 2: Drain the bread and squeeze out as much water as you can.Crumble the bread and place it in a serving bowl. Scatter the tomatoes, onions and chopped basil over the top.Dress Panzanella with extra-virgin olive oil and vinegar. Season with salt and pepper and toss well.Taste and adjust the seasoning with more oil, salt and vinegar.Leave Panzanella to stand for 15 minutes and serve at room temperature.

recipes.label: Lemony Greek Lentil Soup
ingredients: teaspoon (if none available, add 1 more dried)
recipes.instructions:
Step 1: Put the lentils, water, carrot and 1 teaspoon dried thyme into an 8-quart stockpot, cover and set over medium heat.

Step 2: After 15 minutes, lower the heat somewhat and gently bring the water to a simmer, which should take another half an hour or so.

Step 3: Once the lentils have reached the boiling point, turn off the burner and let them sit for 1 hour.

Step 4: After the hour, bring the soup back to a simmer and add the lemon juice, dry basil, fresh thyme, oregano, pepper and salt and simmer for 1 hour.

Step 5: Now, slowly saut the onion and garlic in the olive oil until the onion is tender.

Step 6: Coarsely chop the tomatoes (I do this with kitchen scissors right in the can), and add them and the onion mixture to the soup. Adjust the salt to taste.

Step 7: Bring everything back to the boiling point and simmer for another hour.  After this point, you can turn your burner to its lowest setting, and this soup will happily sit steaming with its lid cocked for several hours until you are ready to enjoy it.

Step 8: Add more water if necessary.

Step 9: Serve with crusty bread and a soft cheese like St. Andre or Cambazola

recipes.label: Panzanella Salad
ingredients: 1 cup english cucumber, peeled and diced
½ cup extra virgin olive oil
recipes.instructions:
Step 1: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees F.

Step 2: Cut the bread into  inch cubes.

Step 3: Place them on a baking sheet.

Step 4: Toss with 2 tablespoons of olive oil and then generously sprinkle with Italian herb seasoning. (I use McCormick spice grinder.)

Step 5: Toss bread cubes for 15 minutes, flipping halfway through.

Step 6: Place toasted bread, tomatoes, cucumber, and mozzarella in a salad bowl.

Step 7: Drizzle with vinaigrette.

Step 8: Sprinkle with fresh basil.

Step 9: In a bowl combine garlic, mustard, and vinegar. Using an emulsion blender slowly add in olive oil. Blend until emulsion is created.

Step 10: Add salt and pepper to season.

scenario.description: Alice's dinner — only ~490 cal remaining for the day

recipes.label: Caramelized Tofu & Gala Apple Salad
ingredients: 3 cups green leaf lettuce (I am using baby
recipes.instructions:
Step 1: First thing of action: bake your tofu. Preheat the oven to 350F.

Step 2: Let tofu sit on a kitchen towel for 15 minutes, turning once, to absorb moisture.

Step 3: Cut tofu into 1 inch cubes.

Step 4: Brush them lightly with vegetable oil (I always use olive oil, but I am certain that this recipe would be best with a peanut oil).

Step 5: Place them on a baking sheet and bake for 35 minutes, turning once.In a small pan, heat butter and garlic on low until the butter has just almost melted.

Step 6: Add the apples, tofu, and salt. Bring heat up to medium, and cook for about 4 minutes. At this point you should add the water and stir every minute for the next 6-7 additional minutes, or until there is little moisture left in the pan. Turn off the heat, and add the brown sugar. Stir to incorporate all of the sugar.

Step 7: Place on top of salad lettuce.

recipes.label: Tuscan Style Bread Salad
ingredients: A handful of fresh basil leaves, shredded
Salt and freshly ground black pepper
recipes.instructions:
Step 1: Preheat the oven to 200C/Fan 180C/400F/Gs Mark

Step 2: Tear the bread into bite

Step 3: Seized pieces and place in a roasting tin.

Step 4: Drizzle over half the oil and toss to coat the bread.

Step 5: Bake for 15-20mins or until the bread is golden and crunchy.

Step 6: Cut the tomatoes and peppers into bite seized chinks and place in a large bowl.

Step 7: Add the onion, olives, remaining oil, vinegar and basil. Season well with salt and freshly ground black pepper then toss together with the bread. Leave to stand for 5 minutes to allow the flavours to infuse.Finally tear the lettuce into bite sized pieces, add to the bowl and toss until well mixed.

recipes.label: Spicy Salad with Kidney Beans, Cheddar, and Nuts
ingredients: 2 dashes (or more if you like it hot!) Tabasco
recipes.instructions:
Step 1: Rinse and drain the kidney beans, cut the sundried tomatoes, and tear the slice of cheese into small pieces.

Step 2: Put the mixed greens in a bowl and top with kidney beans, sundried tomatoes, cheddar cheese, and nuts.

Step 3: Mix together the olive oil, balsamic vinegar, and hot sauce in a small bowl.

Step 4: Pour the dressing over the salad.

Step 5: Fast, easy, and healthy-- one of my favorite lunches!

scenario.description: Alice's afternoon snack — ~160 cal vegetarian snack

recipes.label: Fresh Black Bean Dip
ingredients: a couple of shakes of hot sauce (depending on how you like it)
a couple of pcs of jalapenos (depending on how you like it)
recipes.instructions: Step 1: Mix everything in a food processor until the desired consistency. We liked ours a bit creamy with some chunks of black beans.

recipes.label: Black Bean and Peppers Taco Filling
ingredients: 1 (14 ounce) can black beans, rinsed and drained
1 1/2 tablespoons light or extra-virgin olive oil
recipes.instructions:
Step 1: In a skillet add olive oil, onions and bell pepper. Cook until tender, about 3  5 minutes.

Step 2: Add tomatoes and seasonings, saute for 10 minutes.

Step 3: Add black beans and cook until warm.

Step 4: Serve with tortillas.

Step 5: Additional toppings: Romaine

Step 6: Lettuce, Cheese, jalapenos, salsa, hot sauce, avocado, and greek yogurt

recipes.label: Mexican Quinoa Bowl
ingredients: 15 oz can reduced sodium black beans
recipes.instructions:
Step 1: In a large sauce pan heat 1 teaspoon of olive oil over medium heat.

Step 2: Sauté quinoa, onion, and garlic until garlic is fragrant.

Step 3: Slowly add broth and stir.

Step 4: Add cumin, salt, and pepper. Stir in 2 tablespoons of tomato sauce.

Step 5: Bring to a low boil, cover and reduce heat to low.

Step 6: Simmer for 15 minutes.

Step 7: Add black beans to sauce pan, gently stir to combine.

Step 8: Cover and let stand for 5 minutes.

Step 9: Serve with diced avocado and pico de gallo.

scenario.description: Bob's high-protein breakfast to start the day

recipes.label: Blueberry Stuffed Croissant French Toast with Bacon
ingredients: 8 ounces cream cheese, softened to room temperature
4 store-bought croissants, cut in half lengthwise
softened butter and 100% pure maple syrup (for serving)
recipes.instructions:
Step 1: In a medium bowl, mix together the cream cheese and honey. Gently fold in the bacon and set aside.In a large shallow bowl, whisk together the heavy cream, milk, eggs, vanilla extract, cinnamon and ground nutmeg. Set aside.Melt the butter in a large nonstick skillet over medium heat. Taking each croissant half, dip it fully into the egg mixture, making sure to coat each side. Carefully add it to the hot pan. Repeat 2-3 times depending on how large your skillet is. Try not to overcrowd the pan. Cook for 2 minutes on each side, or until browned to your liking. Repeat for the rest of your croissant halves.

Step 2: Spread the the bacon-cream cheese mixture onto 4 of the croissant halves and place a handful of blueberries on top.

Step 3: Place the remaining 4 croissant halves on top.

Step 4: Garnish with additional blueberries and serve with butter and/or 100% maple syrup if desired. Enjoy immediately!

recipes.label: Cinnamon French Toast Sticks
recipes.instructions:
Step 1: Slice your bread into smaller rectangular sticks

Step 2: In a bowl, whisk your egg, milk, 1 tablespoon of honey, 1 tablespoon of cinnamon powder.Dip your bread in the mix, turn on both sides and set aside

Step 3: In a pan on low heat, heat up your butter and fry your bread sticks.

Step 4: Serve your french toast sticks with the chopped fruits, drizzle the rest of the honey, sprinkle the rest of the cinnamon powder and icing sugar.P:S – If you are having it as a dessert, you can add a scoop of ice-cream to it.

recipes.label: Pecan Waffles
ingredients: 1/4 cup fat-free cholesterol-free egg product or 2 egg whites
recipes.instructions:
Step 1: Spray UNHEATED heart-shaped or traditional waffle iron with cooking spray; then heat waffle iron. Or heat waffle iron; then grease with vegetable oil or shortening. Stir all ingredients except pecans and Topping until blended. Stir in pecans.

Step 2: Pour onto center of hot waffle iron. Close lid of waffle iron.

Step 3: Bake about 5 minutes or until steaming stops. Carefully remove waffle.

Step 4: Serve with Toppings.Yields: three 9-inch traditional waffles

Step 5: Toppings: Orange Cream: Stir 2 tablespoons frozen (thawed) orange juice concentrate into 3/4 cup frozen (thawed) whipped topping until blended.

Step 6: Sauteed Apples or Pears: melt 2 tablespoons margarine or butter in 10-inch skillet over medium heat; add 2 apples or pears, sliced. Cook, stirring frequently, until tender.

scenario.description: Bob's post-workout lunch, high protein (35% goal)

recipes.label: Japanese Chicken Donburi
ingredients: 6 cups baby spinach leaves (about 6 oz) rinsed, drained
1/2 pound boned skinned chicken breast rinsed and cut into ¼" strips
recipes.instructions:
Step 1: In a deep 10-inch or 12-inch frying pan over high heat, stir oil, onion, and ginger until onion is lightly browned, about 2 minutes.

Step 2: Add broth, soy sauce, and sugar.

Step 3: Add chicken to pan. Bring to a boil.

Step 4: Add spinach, cover, and cook until wilted, about 1 minute. Meanwhile, in a small bowl, beat eggs to blend.Reduce heat to low, evenly distribute mixture in pan, and pour in eggs. With a spatula, push vegetables aside slightly so egg mixture can flow down through sauce. Cover and cook just until eggs are softly set, 2 to 2 1/2 minutes.Meanwhile, spoon rice into bowls. Top equally with egg-spinach mixture, including juices.

Step 5: Sprinkle with tomato.

recipes.label: Best Chicken Parmesan
ingredients: 4 cups mozzarella cheese (depending on how much cheese you like)
1/2 cup Parmesan cheese (Grated fresh, not from a green can)
vegetable oil for frying (you can bake them too, but they're better fried!)
recipes.instructions:
Step 1: Depending on how think your chicken breasts are, place them under plastic wrap and pound until thin. If you don't have a meat pounder, use a heavy pot of skillet. You can also fillet these with a knife.Get 3 pie plates or containers. Put flour in one, beaten eggs in one and bread crumbs in one.Dredge chicken breast in flour, then in the egg wash, and then the bread crumbs.Fry cutlets in vegetable oil over med heat. Fry until golden brown.

Step 2: Spread a little marinara on the bottom of a 13x9 baking dish.Make a layer of chicken.

Step 3: Add more marinara. Use most of the first quart.

Step 4: Add a layer of the cheeses. Repeat layers.

Step 5: Sprinkle parsley over last layer of cheese.

Step 6: Bake in a pre-heated 350 degree oven covered for 35 minutes. uncover and bake until top is bubbly!

recipes.label: Rice with Fried Egg and Sausage
recipes.instructions:
Step 1: Cook rice fully in rice cooker or pot according to package directions.Cook turkey sausage according to package directions; we generally just use a skillet.For the egg, melt butter in skillet on medium heat.Crack egg into skillet and fry just until egg white is cooked, or sunny-side up, roughly 1 minute.Using a spatula to lightly break up the egg white around the yolk as it cooks will help ensure a fully cooked white, while keeping the yolk runny.Put rice in a bowl, and lightly drizzle on sesame oil, thick soy sauce, and furikake seasoning.

Step 2: Place the fried egg on top of the rice.  Chop up sausage and toss it in the bowl.Just before eating, use a fork and knife to cut the egg up into small pieces and let the yolk run over the rice.

scenario.description: Bob's dinner — still needs ~1600 cal to hit daily goal

recipes.label: Baked Ziti Or Rigatoni
recipes.instructions:
Step 1: Mix first 4 ingredients and 1 1/2 cups of spaghetti sauce in a bowl. In a 2 1/2 quart baking dish spread 1/2 cup spaghetti sauce.

Step 2: Add ziti mixture and top with remaining 1 1/2 cups of spaghetti sauce.

Step 3: Sprinkle with 1/2 cup of Parmesan cheese.

Step 4: Bake at 375 degrees for 30 minutes or until top slightly browned.

recipes.label: Chicken Noodle Casserole Dish
recipes.instructions:
Step 1: Preheat oven to 350 degrees

Step 2: Sautee onion in 2 tbsp olive oil

Step 3: When onion is soft, add chicken broth

Step 4: Add frozen veggies

Step 5: Bring to a boil then reduce heat and simmer 2 min

Step 6: Slowly whisk in flour

Step 7: Slowly whisk in milk

Step 8: Add sour cream, cheeses and chicken

Step 9: Mix in noodles

Step 10: Pour into a 13x9 casserole dish coated with butter

Step 11: Mix rest of parmesan, bread crumbs and butter in a separate bowl

Step 12: Sprinkle topping on top of casserole

Step 13: Bake for 25 minutes until top is golden

Step 14: Enjoy!

recipes.label: Fried Rice - Chinese comfort food
ingredients: ½ kg rice, cooked earlier and cooled. You can cook the rice the day before and leave it in the fridge overnight to make things simple.
1/2 bunch spring onions, washed and diced
3 eggs, beaten, mixed with a dash of milk
½ large bag mixed diced vegetables (peas, carrots, corn) from the freezer
recipes.instructions:
Step 1: Heat a large fry pan or work and add oil. Slide in the beaten egg mixture and cook for a minute or two until partly set. Turn over carefully and cook the other side. Once its cooked through, remove from pan, slice into small squares and set aside.

Step 2: Add a dash more vegetable oil in wok and fry onion over low heat until soft.

Step 3: Add bacon and cook for a couple of minutes, stirring. Once bacon is browning, turn heat up to high and add frozen vegetables. Cook, stirring occasionally for 3-4 minutes.

Step 4: Add cooked rice, breaking it up with wooden spoon as you go. Continue stirring for a few minutes until the rice starts to form a brown crust in places. Season with light soy sauce and a dash of dark soy sauce.

Step 5: Add a little soy sauce to start with and taste before you add more.

Step 6: Sprinkle with white pepper to taste.

Step 7: Mix thoroughly so rice is evenly coated and coloured.

Step 8: Add reserved omelette pieces and chopped spring onion. Stir through and let warm through for one minute. Turn off heat then add a few shakes of sesame oil. Stir to combine.

Step 9: Serve in deep, generous bowls.

scenario.description: Bob's mid-afternoon snack — high-protein to stay in surplus

recipes.label: Chocolate Java Protein Shake
recipes.instructions: Step 1: Add ingredients in the order listed into a blender.Blend until smooth.Enjoy!

recipes.label: Rice Pudding
ingredients: 3/4 cup medium grain rice or short grain rice
recipes.instructions:
Step 1: In a medium saucepan, bring 1 1/2 cups water to a boil.

Step 2: Add rice, salt and stir.

Step 3: Simmer covered until water has been absorbed (approximately 15 minutes).

Step 4: In another sauce pan, stir in 1 1/2 milk, sugar, and 1 1/2 cups cooked rice, cook over medium heat

Step 5: Stir constantly until thick and creamy, for 15 to 20 minutes.

Step 6: Combine 1/2 cup milk, and beaten egg, then add to saucepan. Cook 2 minutes more, stirring constantly

Step 7: Remove from heat,

Step 8: Add in butter, and vanilla.

Step 9: Season with a pinch of nutmeg or cinnamon.

Step 10: Serve warm.

scenario.description: Carol's breakfast — must be gluten-free AND dairy-free

recipes.label: Vegan Cacao Crunch Granola
recipes.instructions:
Step 1: Preheat the oven to 150C. Line a flat baking tray with parchment paper.In a saucepan on a low heat, add the maple syrup and coconut oil and stir until the coconut oil is completely melted.

Step 2: Add the oats and almonds into a large bowl and pour the maple syrup and coconut oil mixture over. Stir so everything is evenly coated.

Step 3: Add the cacao powder and stir again.

Step 4: Lay the mixture flat on the baking tray and spread out so it's all in one layer.

Step 5: Bake for 45 minutes, stirring every 10-15 minutes to ensure an even cook. Once done, remove from the oven and allow to cool.Once it is completely cool, add to a bowl and mix in the puffed quinoa. Store in a glass jar for up to 2 months.

recipes.label: Your Basic Low Carb Breakfast
recipes.instructions:
Step 1: Cook 2 eggs to any style of your liking Microwave 2 strips of Kirkland Signature Fully-Cooked Bacon to your desired level of crispiness

Step 2: Slice the avocado in half and scoop out the insides Slice strawberries into 1/2 measuring cup Enjoy!

recipes.label: Peaches & Coconut Cream Steel Cut Oatmeal
ingredients: 1 cup Bob's Red Mill steel cut oats
½ cup coconut milk (full fat from the can)
1 large ripe peach, peeled and chopped
recipes.instructions:
Step 1: Bring 3 cups of water to a boil in a saucepan.

Step 2: Add the salt and the steel cut oats. Return to a boil and immediately reduce the heat to medium low. Cover and allow the oats to simmer for 10 to 25 minutes (10 for more al dente oatmeal, 25 for creamier oatmeal).

Step 3: Remove cover and stir oats about every 3 minutes.

Step 4: Once oats are cooked to desired texture, add the coconut milk, honey and chopped walnuts.

Step 5: Remove the oatmeal from the heat, add the vanilla extract and the chopped peaches.

Step 6: Mix everything together and serve in heaping portions!

scenario.description: Carol's lunch — dual restriction compliance stress test

recipes.label: salmon fried rice
ingredients: 2 green onions, thinly sliced, including the greens
4 cups day old cooked white rice (from about 2 cups of raw rice)
2 cups cooked salmon in large chunks
recipes.instructions:
Step 1: Dissolve the brown sugar in the soy sauce in a small bowl. Set aside.2

Step 2: Heat the olive oil in a large sauté pan or wok on medium high heat.

Step 3: Add the diced red onion and bell pepper and sauté until lightly browned, about 5 minutes. Lower the heat to medium and stir in the garlic and grated ginger. Cook for a minute more. 3

Step 4: Add the beaten eggs and stir until just cooked.

Step 5: Add the cooked rice, increase the heat to medium high and cook for a couple minutes more, stirring often.

Step 6: Add the peas, salmon, and green onions. (Be gentle with the salmon so you don't break it up too much.) Stir in the soy sauce mixture and remove from heat.

Step 7: Garnish with cilantro to serve, serve immediately.

recipes.label: The "Even my picky bf will eat it" Salad
recipes.instructions:
Step 1: Wash and cut romaine lettuce and divide between two bowls.

Step 2: Chop bell pepper and spread evenly between the two salads.

Step 3: Make the dressing by blending the ripe avocado with the lime juice, Tabasco, cilantro, 2 tablespoons olive oil, and water (start with 1/4 cup and add more until the desired consistency is reached. We kept it pretty thick.) Season with salt and pepper to taste.

Step 4: Heat a skillet over medium heat.

Step 5: Add the remaining tablespoon oil. Then add the minced garlic. Once the garlic is fragrant, add the shrimp.

Step 6: Once the shrimp is cooked through, add it to the salads. Divide the dressing between the two salads too.

Step 7: Sprinkle cashews on top if desired.

Step 8: Serve with tortilla chips.

recipes.label: Japanese Sushi
recipes.instructions:
Step 1: Pour cooked rice into a tray. Finely slice the salmon and the tuna.

Step 2: Put the seaweed onto a sushi mat and press rice down onto it.

Step 3: Slice the mushrooms and asparagus pieces and lay along the rice.

Step 4: Add the wasabi.

Step 5: Roll the sushi and cut into slices.

Step 6: Serve with salmon caviar, wasabi and soy.

Step 7: Recipe two: Squeeze the rice into balls and press the prawns, tuna or salmon into the top.
